$comment: DELIVERY is a capability distinct from the capabilities it carries.
UNPROVEN: no scenarios/records/install-path.json exists for this package yet.
The extensions have been observed working under `pi -e` and under a local
package install, but ADR-0051 clause 1 is explicit that neither proves DELIVERY:
a real `pi install git:` into a clean HOME, and an upgrade from an older release,
have not been demonstrated. Until that record lands, every release note, ADR and
handoff referencing this package MUST state that delivery is unproven.
